domainObjects.title: EBOM — CPP-1000 Pump Package Rev C engineering structure
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering BOM defines CPP-1000 Pump Package Rev C with pump module, baseplate, driver coupling, instrumentation, and documentation package.

domainObjects.title: EBOM — Impeller Housing Assembly Rev C investment-casting-only component path
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Impeller Housing EBOM Rev C replaces legacy casting ambiguity with investment-casting-only requirement for future builds.

domainObjects.title: EBOM — CPP-1000 Pump Module Rev C subassembly structure
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Pump Module EBOM contains impeller housing assembly, shaft assembly, bearing housing, and mechanical seal.

domainObjects.title: Executive Briefing Source — Week 31 commitment protection recovery plan
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Briefing source collects customer, supplier, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence for executive review.

domainObjects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-033 — Supplier casting containment plan
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Validate containment lot and supplier corrective action evidence.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CAPA contains supplier corrective action for Apex Foundry CPP-1000 casting porosity.

domainObjects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-041 — FAT documentation standardization
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CAPA standardizes FAT documentation controls after MPS weld-documentation gap.

domainObjects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-047 — CPP-1000 weld process corrective action (PLT-200)
domainObjects.description: Corrective and preventive action for CPP-1000 weld porosity identified in NCR-NR-2026-231. Root cause: pre-heat temperature not maintained per WPS-022 on second-shift operations. Containment: additional preheat compliance checks on all active pressure-containing welds. Prevention: updated WPS-022 hold point and digital preheat logging.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Process correction prevents recurrence on WO-NR-2026-1101 remaining welds and future CPP-1000 builds.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Implement digital preheat logging by 2026-09-08; validate on remaining WO-NR-2026-1101 welds before FAT-NR-2026-3002.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CAPA-NR-2026-047 opened 2026-08-26 in response to NCR-NR-2026-231 weld porosity; containment effective 2026-08-28; verification due 2026-09-08; prerequisite for FAT-NR-2026-3002 clearance.

domainObjects.title: Material Certification — Apex heat H-7726 for CPP-1000 casting lot C1088
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CMTR confirms heat H-7726 chemistry and mechanicals; dimensional nonconformance was discovered during receiving inspection, not material chemistry review.

domainObjects.title: Customer Commitment — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 September site-ready delivery
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Missed delivery risks outage-window loss, premium freight, and executive escalation.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Prioritize CPP-1000 casting, ECO, machining, quality disposition, FAT, and shipment recovery.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Customer commitment record ties Horizon LNG September field installation date to CPP-1000 demand DMD-NR-GOU-CPP-HORIZON-01.

domainObjects.title: NorthRiver Industrial Systems

domainObjects.title: CESC-NR-2026-014 — CPP-1000 commissioning delay customer escalation (Horizon LNG Partners)
domainObjects.description: Customer escalation from Horizon LNG Partners project director regarding CPP-1000 commissioning delay impact on LNG terminal startup schedule. Horizon LNG Partners has a 30-day window before penalty clauses activate. VP Commercial engaged to coordinate resolution; SVC-400 service team providing daily status updates. Linked to WAR-NR-2026-021 field warranty case.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Horizon LNG Partners penalty window opens in 30 days; VP Commercial and SVC-400 must deliver field resolution or formal recovery plan.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Deliver CPP-1000 alignment assessment results to Horizon LNG Partners project director by 2026-09-22; confirm warranty claim disposition.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CESC-NR-2026-014 escalation raised 2026-09-16 by Horizon LNG Partners; VP Commercial engaged; links to WAR-NR-2026-021; penalty window opens in 30 days from escalation date.

domainObjects.title: Customer Communication — Horizon recovery plan and outage-window protection update
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Commercial update tells Horizon the repair path passed reinspection, premium freight remains reserved, and the outage-window delivery plan is still protected.

detail.summary: repaired casting released; FAT target maintained; premium freight reserved

domainObjects.title: Rework Demand — Engineering disposition creates CPP-1000 casting repair demand
domainObjects.evidence_summary: ECO/MRB disposition creates a separate rework demand for one affected casting; this demand is related to but distinct from the Horizon customer demand.

domainObjects.title: Drawing Revision — CPP-1000 casting Rev C requires investment castings only
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Drawing Rev C clarifies future CPP-1000 casting procurement path: investment castings only; existing affected stock requires ECO disposition.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-2026-071 — CPP-1000 bearing housing revision
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Prevents rework on CPP-1000 September customer builds.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Release ECN before final machining traveler issue.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates CPP-1000 bearing housing interface before Pueblo machining release.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-2026-084 — LCM-5000 controls panel layout update
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates LCM-5000 control panel layout before controls integration.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-2026-091 — CPP-1000 cryogenic pump shaft geometry revision ECO
domainObjects.description: Engineering change order to revise CPP-1000 shaft bore tolerance from ±0.003 in to ±0.004 in with an approved surface finish change to Ra 63 (from Ra 32) to address Apex Foundry Group casting capability. BOM revision and drawing update required. Effectivity: new shaft order placed with revised drawing; non-conforming units dispositioned via MRB NCR-NR-2026-231.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Revised shaft spec unblocks CPP-1000 machining; critical path for Horizon LNG Partners September delivery.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm effectivity with Apex Foundry Group; release revised drawings to PLT-200 machining.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-091 issued to revise CPP-1000 shaft bore tolerance; gates WO-NR-2026-1101 machining release; closed after drawing release confirmed at Apex Foundry Group.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-2026-092 — MPS-4000 cooling manifold BOM revision ECO
domainObjects.description: Engineering change order to update MPS-4000 modular process skid cooling manifold BOM. Previous manifold design (CPF-MANIFOLD-OLD-001) discontinued by supplier; approved substitute CPF-MANIFOLD-ALT-003 qualified and BOM revised. No form/fit/function impact; effectivity immediate for all open MPS-4000 builds.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: BOM alignment prevents procurement delay on MPS-4000 cooling manifold; low schedule risk.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Archive substitute qualification records; close purchasing notes on open MPS-4000 work orders.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-092 issued 2026-08-20 to qualify CPF-MANIFOLD-ALT-003 substitute on MPS-4000 BOM; closed 2026-08-30 after qualification records archived.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-GOU-099 — CPP-1000 impeller clearance tolerance update
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering released CPP-1000 impeller clearance update to allow contained rework on affected casting lot.

domainObjects.title: Supplier Shipment — Apex Foundry ships CPP-1000 casting lot C1088
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry ships four CPP-1000 casting sets from lot C1088 / heat H-7726 against PO-APX-88112 line 10.

domainObjects.title: Capacity Reservation — CNC Cell capacity reserved for CPP-1000 recovery
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Planning reserves PLT-200 CNC Cell capacity for the impeller housing finish machining slot ahead of the Horizon recovery date.

domainObjects.title: Customer Delivery — CPP-1000 package delivered within the Horizon outage window
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CPP-1000 package delivers to the Horizon LNG site ahead of the September outage window, fulfilling the customer commitment.

domainObjects.title: Dimensional Inspection — Repaired casting bore confirmed within tolerance
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CMM dimensional recheck confirms bore is back within the 8.250 +0.002/-0.000 tolerance after weld repair and machining allowance.

domainObjects.title: Dispatch List — PLT-200 CNC Cell prioritizes CPP-1000 recovery
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Daily dispatch list sequences WO-NR-GOU-3001 ahead of routine work at the PLT-200 CNC Cell to protect the Horizon recovery date.

domainObjects.title: Engineering Disposition — Controlled weld repair authorized for lot C1088
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering issues the formal disposition record authorizing certified weld repair and reinspection of the held casting under ECO-NR-GOU-099 and MRB-NR-GOU-117.

domainObjects.title: Expedite Decision — Premium freight and recovery machining expedite approved
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Executive review approves premium freight reservation and continued recovery-machining expedite to protect the Horizon outage-window date.

domainObjects.title: Final Assembly — Pump Module integrated with baseplate, coupling, and controls
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Final assembly integrates the Pump Module with baseplate, driver coupling, instrumentation, and documentation package per WO-NR-GOU-1001.

domainObjects.title: FAT Complete — Horizon CPP-1000 package passes factory acceptance test
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CPP-1000 package completes FAT against the checklist in FAT-NR-GOU-6101, clearing the package for shipment release.

domainObjects.title: FAT Ready — CPP-1000 package cleared to begin factory acceptance test
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Final inspection pass clears the CPP-1000 package to begin FAT on schedule against the Horizon outage-window date.

domainObjects.title: Final Inspection — Staged CPP-1000 package passes pre-FAT visual and dimensional check
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Final inspection confirms the staged CPP-1000 package meets visual and dimensional requirements before FAT readiness is declared.

domainObjects.title: First Piece Inspection — First finished impeller housing bore verified in tolerance
domainObjects.evidence_summary: First-piece bore and finish measurements pass, approving the CNC-HBM-12 setup to continue for the remaining run.

domainObjects.title: Hold Release — Repaired casting released from quality hold
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Quality releases the casting from hold after UT/PT and dimensional reinspection both pass, authorizing release to WIP.

domainObjects.title: Kit Release — Pump Module build kit released to PLT-200 Assembly
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Shaft, bearing housing, mechanical seal, and assembly hardware kit releases to PLT-200 Assembly ahead of the impeller housing arriving from machining.

domainObjects.title: Labor Booking — 8.5 hours booked to the finish machining operation
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Labor hours across setup, first piece, and production run are booked to WO-NR-GOU-3001 operation 050 across the two shifts.

domainObjects.title: Machine Reservation — CNC-HBM-12 and fixture booked for the recovery slot
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Planning books CNC-HBM-12 and fixture FIX-CPP-210 for the 2026-08-12 06:00-14:00 finish machining slot.

domainObjects.title: Material Issue — Repaired casting issued to PLT-200 CNC Cell
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Materials issues the repaired casting to the CNC Cell against WO-NR-GOU-3001, consuming the released WIP quantity.

domainObjects.title: Pump Module Assembly — Impeller housing, shaft, bearing housing, and seal built up
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Pump Module assembly builds the finished impeller housing into the shaft/bearing/seal kit per WO-NR-GOU-2001 and the Pump Module MBOM.

domainObjects.title: Priority Override — Planner overrides standard queue to sequence CPP-1000 first
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Planner overrides FIFO work-center queue order to move the Horizon impeller housing ahead of two lower-priority work orders at the constrained CNC Cell.

domainObjects.title: Production Complete — Impeller housing finish machining closes out
domainObjects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-GOU-3001 operation 050 closes complete, releasing the finished impeller housing for transfer to Pump Module assembly.

domainObjects.title: Production Run — Remaining impeller housing finish machining and balance correction
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Production run completes finish machining and balance correction on the repaired impeller housing following first-piece approval.

domainObjects.title: Quality Hold — CPP-1000 casting unit quarantined pending MRB disposition
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Receiving inspection bore oversize and porosity finding places the affected casting unit on quality hold pending NCR and MRB disposition.

domainObjects.title: Machine Queue — CNC-HBM-12 carries an 18-hour queue ahead of the recovery slot
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CNC-HBM-12 queue backlog is the reason the recovery machining operation cannot start until 2026-08-12, even after the repaired casting is released.

domainObjects.title: Receiving — CPP-1000 casting lot C1088 received at PLT-200 dock
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Dock receipt of lot C1088 opens the receiving inspection gate before the casting set can be released to WIP.

domainObjects.title: Recovery Milestone — Reinspection pass clears critical path for Horizon recovery
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Planning records the reinspection pass as the recovery-schedule milestone that clears finish machining to proceed on the critical path.

domainObjects.title: Recovery Schedule — Cross-functional sequence protecting Horizon outage window
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Recovery schedule sequences casting repair, machining, pump module assembly, final assembly, FAT, and shipment against the Horizon outage-window date.

domainObjects.title: Released to WIP — Repaired casting released to work-in-process for finish machining
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting moves from quality hold into work-in-process, feeding the finish machining operation on WO-NR-GOU-3001.

domainObjects.title: Return Receipt — Repaired casting received back from Precision Alloy Repair Services
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting returns from the certified weld repair vendor against PO-OSP-24071, ready for UT/PT and dimensional reinspection.

domainObjects.title: Machine Setup — CNC-HBM-12 set up for impeller housing finish machining
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Operator completes fixture load and program setup on CNC-HBM-12 ahead of finish machining the repaired impeller housing.

domainObjects.title: Shift Handoff — Day shift A hands off finish machining to Day shift B
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Shift handoff note passes machine status, first-piece approval, and remaining run quantity from Day shift A to Day shift B on CNC-HBM-12.

domainObjects.title: Shipment Released — SHP-NR-GOU-6101 released for premium freight pickup
domainObjects.evidence_summary: FAT completion clears SHP-NR-GOU-6101 for release to the FrontRange Expedite team-truck premium freight pickup.

domainObjects.title: Operator Signoff — Finish machining and balance correction confirmed complete
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Production supervisor signs off that finish machining and balance correction are complete and within specification for the impeller housing.

domainObjects.title: Staging — CPP-1000 package staged in FAT Bay 2
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Completed CPP-1000 package stages in FAT Bay 2 ahead of final inspection and factory acceptance test.

domainObjects.title: Traveler Release — TRV-NR-GOU-2101 released to the production floor
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Traveler TRV-NR-GOU-2101 releases to the floor with the outside weld repair operation inserted ahead of finish machining.

domainObjects.title: UT/PT — Repaired casting weld passes ultrasonic and dye penetrant testing
domainObjects.evidence_summary: UT/PT screening of the weld repair zone passes with no indications, clearing the way for dimensional reinspection.

domainObjects.title: WIP Move — Finished impeller housing transferred to PLT-200 Assembly
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Finished impeller housing moves from the CNC Cell to PLT-200 Assembly to complete the Pump Module build kit.

domainObjects.title: Internal Transfer — Pump Module shipped from PLT-200 to PLT-300
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Completed Pump Module transfers from PLT-200 to PLT-300 systems integration for final assembly into the CPP-1000 package.

domainObjects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3001 — CPS-3000 factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
domainObjects.description: Factory acceptance test plan for CPS-3000 compressor package at PLT-300 Grand Junction. Test scope: mechanical run, performance curves, vibration baseline, noise level, and customer witness sign-off by Catalyst Chemical representative. Prerequisites: WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication complete; controls integration ready; customer witness scheduled.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: FAT sign-off gates CPS-3000 shipment to Catalyst Chemical; customer witness availability is the constraint.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication completion; schedule Catalyst Chemical witness for FAT week.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3001 planned 2026-09-01; readiness confirmed 2026-09-04; execution due 2026-09-07 to protect CPS-3000 Catalyst Chemical shipment window.

domainObjects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3002 — CPP-1000 cryogenic factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
domainObjects.description: Factory acceptance test plan for CPP-1000 cryogenic pump package at PLT-300 Grand Junction. Includes cryogenic performance qualification, hydrostatic test, NPSH test, and Horizon LNG Partners witness sign-off. Prerequisites: WO-NR-2026-1101 machining complete; CAPA-NR-2026-047 weld process verification complete; controls integration ready.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: FAT is the final quality gate before CPP-1000 shipment to Horizon LNG Partners; CAPA verification is a prerequisite.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm CAPA-NR-2026-047 verification completion; arrange cryogenic test media; schedule Horizon LNG witness.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3002 planned 2026-09-03; readiness review 2026-09-06; cryogenic FAT requires CAPA-NR-2026-047 weld process verification as a prerequisite.

domainObjects.title: FAT Checklist — Horizon CPP-1000 recovery package readiness gate
domainObjects.evidence_summary: FAT checklist is held open pending recovery machining completion and repaired casting release into the CPP-1000 package.

domainObjects.title: Revenue Exposure — Horizon, Catalyst, and Atlas September commitments
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: At-risk revenue plus avoidable expedite and penalty exposure creates executive-level prioritization signal.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Finance exposure rollup ties demand values, premium freight, penalty exposure, and margin erosion to the September recovery plan.

domainObjects.title: Receiving Inspection — CPP-1000 casting dimensional and porosity review
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Receiving inspection found one casting set with bore oversize and localized porosity indication; NCR-NR-GOU-301 opened for MRB disposition.

detail.inspection_method: CMM dimensional inspection plus dye penetrant screening

domainObjects.title: Reinspection — Repaired CPP-1000 casting passes UT/PT and dimensional review
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting passed UT/PT and dimensional reinspection; Quality released it back to usable supply for Horizon recovery machining.

domainObjects.title: Foundry Lot — Apex CPP-1000 casting lot C1088 / heat H-7726
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Foundry lot C1088 / heat H-7726 contains the affected CPP-1000 casting set later tied to NCR-NR-GOU-301.

domainObjects.title: Machine — CNC-HBM-12 horizontal boring mill assigned to CPP recovery
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CNC-HBM-12 is reserved for the impeller housing finish machining slot after reinspection release.

domainObjects.title: Inspection Measurements — CPP-1000 casting bore oversize and localized porosity
domainObjects.evidence_summary: CMM record shows bore oversize by 0.006 inch; dye penetrant note flags localized porosity requiring engineering disposition.

domainObjects.title: MRB-NR-GOU-117 — Use-as-is with engineering-approved rework traveler
domainObjects.evidence_summary: MRB approved controlled rework against ECO-NR-GOU-099 for the quarantined CPP-1000 casting set.

domainObjects.title: NCR-NR-2026-218 — CPP casting porosity at incoming inspection
domainObjects.next_action_summary: MRB disposition required before machining queue release.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Incoming inspection identified porosity on CPP-1000 casting lot from Apex Foundry Group.

domainObjects.title: NCR-NR-2026-231 — CPP-1000 weld sub-assembly inspection failure (PLT-200)
domainObjects.description: Non-conformance report raised on WO-NR-2026-1101 after radiographic inspection identified a porosity indication exceeding ASME B31.3 acceptance criteria on the CPP-1000 outlet-nozzle-to-casing weld. MRB disposition: repair in place. Corrective action required per CAPA-NR-2026-047.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Weld repair adds approximately 5 days to CPP-1000 sub-assembly; impacts FAT-NR-2026-3002 schedule.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Complete weld repair per CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; re-inspect to close NCR.

domainObjects.title: PO-NR-2026-4611:10 — CPS-3000 large frame forging purchase order (Summit Forge Works)

domainObjects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 forging arrival gates WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication start at Pueblo.

domainObjects.title: BOO / Routing — CPP-1000 recovery route with recursive subassembly operations
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Routing defines receive, rough machine, outside weld repair, reinspection, finish machine, balance, pump module assembly, final assembly, FAT, and shipment operations.

domainObjects.title: Service RMA-NR-GOU-014 — Helios CPP-1000 startup vibration evidence

domainObjects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7011 — CPP-1000 outbound shipment to Horizon LNG Partners
domainObjects.description: Planned outbound shipment of CPP-1000 cryogenic pump package to Horizon LNG Partners LNG terminal site. Requires FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off and full documentation (test reports, ASME data books, packing list). Special handling: cryogenic-rated transport with nitrogen purge. Staging at Grand Junction before custom carrier pickup.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: CPP-1000 delivery to Horizon LNG Partners is the primary September commitment; any delay incurs SLA exposure.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off date; book cryogenic transport carrier; prepare shipping documentation.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7011 planned 2026-09-08; staged at Grand Junction 2026-09-12; carrier pickup due 2026-09-14 for Horizon LNG Partners delivery; gates on FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off.

domainObjects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7012 — CPS-3000 outbound shipment to Catalyst Chemical
domainObjects.description: Planned outbound shipment of CPS-3000 compressor package to Catalyst Chemical process plant. Requires FAT-NR-2026-3001 sign-off and complete documentation (test reports, Catalyst Chemical data book, P&ID mark-ups). Standard flatbed freight with oversized load permit. Staging at Grand Junction before freight pickup.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 delivery to Catalyst Chemical on September commit; FAT witness schedule is the upstream dependency.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3001 witness availability; obtain oversized load permit; arrange flatbed freight.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7012 planned 2026-09-10; staged 2026-09-13; awaiting FAT-NR-2026-3001 sign-off before carrier pickup for Catalyst Chemical delivery.

domainObjects.title: SUPQ-NR-2026-051 — CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance (Apex Foundry Group)
domainObjects.description: Incoming inspection at PLT-200 Pueblo identified a dimensional non-conformance on CPP-1000 cryogenic pump shaft castings received from Apex Foundry Group. Shaft bore diameter out of tolerance ±0.003 in on all 12 units in batch SHP-AFG-2026-0714. Root cause under investigation; engineering ECO-NR-2026-091 initiated to determine corrective design path.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Delays CPP-1000 machining at Pueblo; puts Horizon LNG Partners September commitment at risk.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Await ECO-NR-2026-091 disposition; evaluate MRB containment for non-conforming batch.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry Group CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance confirmed by incoming inspection at PLT-200; corrective ECO-NR-2026-091 triggered.

domainObjects.title: Tooling — CPP-1000 impeller housing machining fixture FIX-CPP-210
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Machining fixture FIX-CPP-210 is required for rough and finish machining of the CPP-1000 impeller housing.

domainObjects.title: Traveler — CPP-1000 recovery machining with inserted outside repair operation
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Traveler adds controlled outside weld repair operation before final machining, balance, assembly, and FAT readiness.

domainObjects.title: WAR-NR-2026-017 — AquaGrid PPS seal leakage warranty case
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Warranty case records AquaGrid PPS-2000 seal leakage feedback routed to Service, Quality, and Engineering.

domainObjects.title: WAR-NR-2026-021 — CPP-1000 field installation warranty case (Horizon LNG Partners)
domainObjects.description: Warranty case raised by Horizon LNG Partners following CPP-1000 installation at LNG terminal. Issue: higher-than-specified vibration reading on startup commissioning (12 mm/s vs 8 mm/s spec). SVC-400 Houston service team dispatched for site assessment. Preliminary finding: installation alignment deviation; not a product defect.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Unresolved warranty issue with Horizon LNG Partners during active commissioning creates relationship and revenue risk.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Complete site alignment assessment; provide field alignment report by 2026-09-22; close warranty case if alignment confirmed.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: WAR-NR-2026-021 opened 2026-09-15; Horizon LNG Partners CPP-1000 vibration during commissioning; SVC-400 field assessment started 2026-09-18; preliminary finding points to installation alignment deviation.

domainObjects.title: WAR-NR-2026-024 — Helios CPP startup vibration support case
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Warranty support case records Helios Hydrogen CPP-1000 startup vibration investigation.

domainObjects.description: Primary machining work order for CPP-1000 cryogenic pump package components at Pueblo.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Protects CPP-1000 September customer delivery window.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm large-frame machining slot and inspection availability.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Work order releases CPP-1000 Pueblo machining activity tied to Horizon LNG September demand.

domainObjects.title: WO-NR-2026-1101 — CPP-1000 revised shaft machining work order (PLT-200 Pueblo)
domainObjects.description: Machining work order for CPP-1000 cryogenic pump package revised shaft at PLT-200 Pueblo, released after ECO-NR-2026-091 effectivity. Large-frame machining centre allocated; shaft bore machined to revised ±0.004 in tolerance per ECO-NR-2026-091 drawing update. NCR-NR-2026-231 raised against this WO for a weld sub-assembly inspection failure.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for CPP-1000 Horizon LNG Partners September commitment; delay cascades to FAT and shipment.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Complete weld sub-assembly after CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; release to FAT-NR-2026-3002.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1101 released 2026-08-10 after ECO-NR-2026-091 effectivity; machining complete 2026-09-02; NCR-NR-2026-231 raised on weld sub-assembly during execution.

domainObjects.title: WO-NR-2026-1102 — CPS-3000 large frame fabrication and certified welding (PLT-200 Pueblo)
domainObjects.description: Fabrication and certified welding work order for CPS-3000 compressor package large frame at PLT-200 Pueblo. Requires forging supply from PO-NR-2026-4611:10 (Summit Forge Works) before fabrication start. Feeds CPS-3000 factory acceptance test FAT-NR-2026-3001 at Grand Junction.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Fabrication must complete before Grand Junction FAT slot; forging arrival from Summit Forge Works is upstream dependency.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Confirm forging arrival from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; initiate fabrication once forgings cleared.
domainObjects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1102 released 2026-08-12; awaiting CPS-3000 forgings from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; feeds FAT-NR-2026-3001 at Grand Junction.

domainObjectLinks.relationship_summary: Supplier quality issue triggers engineering change order for shaft spec revision.
ECO effectivity gates CPP-1000 machining work order release at Pueblo.
CPS-3000 forging PO arrival is the upstream dependency for fabrication work order.
Weld inspection during WO-NR-2026-1101 execution surfaces CPP-1000 weld porosity NCR.
NCR weld porosity finding triggers corrective action for weld process improvement.
CPS-3000 fabrication completion feeds the Grand Junction factory acceptance test.
CAPA weld process verification is a prerequisite for CPP-1000 FAT clearance at Grand Junction.
CPS-3000 FAT sign-off gates outbound shipment to Catalyst Chemical.
CPP-1000 FAT sign-off gates outbound shipment to Horizon LNG Partners.
CPP-1000 delivery at Horizon LNG site precedes commissioning and subsequent warranty issue.
Unresolved warranty field issue escalates to formal customer escalation by project director.
ECO-NR-2026-092 cooling manifold BOM revision directly affects the MPS-4000 assembly.
ECO-NR-2026-092 approved substitute applies to all open MPS-family process skid builds.
VP Engineering has engineering authority over CPP-1000 bearing housing revision ECO.
VP Engineering owns ECO-NR-2026-091 CPP-1000 shaft geometry tolerance revision.
VP Engineering owns ECO-NR-2026-092 MPS-4000 cooling manifold BOM revision.
VP Engineering is responsible for CPS-3000 factory acceptance test execution at Grand Junction.
VP Engineering is responsible for CPP-1000 cryogenic factory acceptance test at Grand Junction.
VP Quality governs NCR-NR-2026-218 CPP casting porosity non-conformance quality record.
VP Quality governs NCR-NR-2026-231 CPP-1000 weld sub-assembly non-conformance.
VP Quality owns CAPA-NR-2026-033 casting quality corrective action.
VP Quality owns CAPA-NR-2026-047 weld process corrective action.
VP Quality owns the Apex Foundry Group CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance.
VP Commercial is the primary executive owner for the Horizon LNG Partners commissioning escalation.
